testcase.name: test07_sePuedenObtenerTodasLasCategorias

table if exists proveedor cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists stock cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuarios cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists venta cascade Hibernate: create table ajuste_stock (cantidad integer not null, fecha date not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_motivo bigint not null, id_producto bigint not null, id_stock bigint, id_usuario bigint not null, detalles varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table categoria (id bigint generated by default as identity, categoria varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table cliente (activo boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, nyap varchar(255) not null, telefono varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table detalle_ingreso (cantidad integer not null, precio_mayorista numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_ingreso bigint not null, id_producto bigint not null, id_stock bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table detalle_venta (cantidad integer not null, precio_venta numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_producto bigint not null, id_stock bigint, id_venta bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table ingreso (fecha date not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_proveedor bigint not null, id_usuario bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table motivo (afecta_positivo boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, motivo varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table producto (precio numeric(38,2), id bigint generated by default as identity, id_categoria bigint not null, nombre varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table proveedor (activo boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, corredor varchar(255), proveedor varchar(255) not null, telefono varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table stock (cantidad integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_producto bigint not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table usuarios (id bigint generated by default as identity, password varchar(255) not null, rol varchar(255) not null check ((rol in ('ADMIN','USER'))), username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table venta (fecha date not null, pagado boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, id_usuario bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists ajuste_stock add constraint FKlcx6o0ttxpduteya2sqggnghx foreign key (id_motivo) references motivo Hibernate: alter table if exists ajuste_stock add constraint FKkgfbfwn1dgb40tp0i7qp3mebt foreign key (id_producto) references producto Hibernate: alter table if exists ajuste_stock add constraint FKs9ookgwide1gamkve449kni4w foreign key (id_stock) references stock Hibernate: alter table if exists ajuste_stock add constraint ingreso Hibernate: alter table if exists detalle_ingreso add constraint FKlumqgko8y716k3xnhy267bpxp foreign key (id_producto) references producto Hibernate: alter table if exists detalle_ingreso add constraint FK1q9rru3g6vis7dshk58m6m7co foreign key (id_stock) references stock Hibernate: alter table if exists detalle_venta add constraint FKsntaik0t9jxcky777753wytsx foreign key (id_producto) testcase.name: test05_noPuedenExistirDosCategoriasConElMismoNombre
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categoria (categoria) values (?) Hibernate: insert into categoria (categoria) values (?) 2026-07-02T14:17:47.608-03:00 WARN 92285 --- [ventalen] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.error : HHH000247: ErrorCode: 0, SQLState: 23505 2026-07-02T14:17:47.608-03:00 WARN 92285 --- [ventalen] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.error : ERROR: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "categoria_categoria_key" Detail: Key (categoria)=(prueba) already exists.

testcase.name: test04_sePuedeBuscarUnaCategoriaPorNombreYObtenerSuId
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categoria (categoria) values (?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.categoria from categoria c1_0 where upper(c1_0.categoria)=upper(?)
